p.strong: All strategies utilize this to reduce O(n²) to O(n)

ol.li: Compute: Only generate $Q_t, K_t, V_t$ for current token.
Attend: Compute Attention using new $Q_t$ and expanded $K, V$.

div.p: beams = [(start_token, 0.0)] for step in range(max_len): candidates = [] for seq, score in beams: logits = model(seq) top_k = logits.topk(k) # expand & accumulate score beams = sorted(candidates)[:k]

ul.li: Tuning: Requires careful T, p values
